summary: Iteration 23 - Filter optimization testing complete. All 18 backend tests passed. Response times improved from ~300ms to ~40-70ms for show_all=true queries. Tag caching with 20s TTL working. Frontend loads correctly, unlocked features work. Tag filter requires Google OAuth login (as designed).

backend: GET /api/leaderboard?show_all=true&period=all returns correct data (leaderboard, total_papers, total_in_period, total_matches)
GET /api/leaderboard?show_all=true&period=week returns only this week papers
GET /api/leaderboard?show_all=true&period=month returns only this month papers
Response time for show_all=true is under 500ms (actual: ~40-70ms, was 300ms before)
Response does NOT contain _full_data key (internal cache data not leaked)
Second call for tag query is equally fast (cached) - first: 76ms, second: 34ms
GET /api/leaderboard?tags=cs.CV,cs.AI&tag_mode=or&period=all returns union of tags (59 papers)
GET /api/leaderboard?tags=cs.CV,cs.AI&tag_mode=and&period=all returns intersection of tags (3 papers)
global_stats=false does NOT include global_* fields
GET /api/leaderboard?category=cs.RO&period=all still works for normal category view
GET /api/tags returns tag list correctly (59 tags with id, count, matches)
frontend: Category tabs visible and switch works (Robotics, Distributed Computing, Economics, etc.)
Period filter buttons visible (Most Recent, This Week, This Month, All Time)
Period filter switching works (tested recent -> week)
Status bar displays papers and comparisons count
Leaderboard table renders with correct columns (rank, paper, score, win %, CI, matches, published)
Rank badges display correctly (gold for #1, silver for #2, bronze for #3)
Tag filter toggle locked for unauthenticated users (data-testid='tag-filter-toggle-locked')
'More' categories dropdown visible for additional categories beyond 5

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend debounce logic for tag mode is correctly implemented (250ms delay, AbortController for stale requests)
Pre-computed cache for _all_papers_leaderboard serves all 4 period variants efficiently
Tag query cache uses proper TTL (20s) and max entries (100)
_full_data key properly excluded from API responses

success_rate.frontend: 100% (10/10 UI verifications passed for unlocked features)

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified filter optimization features. Key performance improvements: show_all=true response time ~40-70ms (was 300ms), tag queries cached with 20s TTL. Tag filter UI requires Google OAuth (locked button visible for unauthenticated users). Frontend debounce (250ms) implemented for tag mode. All backend endpoints for the optimization are working correctly.

api_endpoints.show_all_with_periods: WORKING - all 4 periods return correct filtered data
api_endpoints.pagination: WORKING - limit and offset parameters work correctly
api_endpoints.no_internal_data_leak: WORKING - _full_data key not exposed in responses
